name: BB:NetworkDefinition: Broadcast Address Space
notes: Edit this BB to include the broadcast address space of your network.  This is used to remove false positive events that may be caused by the use of broadcast messages.
bb_references: BB:NetworkDefinition: Broadcast Address Space on events which are detected by the undefined system
conditions_text: where either the source or destination IP is one of the following 255.255.0.0/16, 172.16.255.255, 10.0.0.255
TD_list: APPLY BB:NetworkDefinition: Broadcast Address Space on events which are detected by the undefined system
AND where either the source or destination IP is one of the following 255.255.0.0/16, 172.16.255.255, 10.0.0.255
